title: Knife in the Water
writer: Jakub Goldberg, Roman Polanski, Jerzy Skolimowski
actors: Leon Niemczyk, Jolanta Umecka, Zygmunt Malanowicz
plot: A couple pick up a hitchhiker on the way to their yacht. The husband invites the young man to come along for their day's sailing. As the voyage progresses, the antagonism between the two men grows. A violent confrontation is inevi...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 2 nominations total
